auto/security.name: auto/security
auto/security.action: review and fix security issues — prioritize by severity

auto/stale_exclude.name: auto/stale_exclude
auto/stale_exclude.action: remove stale exclusion or verify it's still needed

auto/initial-review.name: auto/initial-review
auto/initial-review.description: Initial review of 20 unscored subjective dimensions

action_steps.title: Review each security finding
action_steps.detail: Check each security finding: log_sensitive findings are in indexer/hybrid/ (dead code - will be deleted). hardcoded_secret_name in GrammarConfigLoader.java:132 needs variable rename.

action_steps.title: Fix log_sensitive by removing sensitive fields from log messages
action_steps.detail: log_sensitive findings in HybridConllUProcessor, HybridIndexer, CollocationsBuilder, SinglePassConlluProcessor are in dead code - resolved by deleting indexer/hybrid/ package.

action_steps.title: Fix hardcoded_secret_name by renaming variable
action_steps.detail: GrammarConfigLoader.java line 132: rename variable 'tokens' to something non-sensitive like 'parts' or 'components'.

dead-migration-code.name: dead-migration-code
dead-migration-code.description: Remove dead code from incomplete BlackLab migration: indexer/hybrid/, root LuceneIndexer, .bak files

action_steps.title: Delete indexer/hybrid/ package and all classes
action_steps.detail: Delete entire src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/indexer/hybrid/ package (22+ files). Verify no production code imports these.

action_steps.title: Delete root-level LuceneIndexer.java if dead
action_steps.detail: Check if root-level LuceneIndexer.java is dead (not reachable from Main). If yes, delete. Otherwise keep.

action_steps.title: Remove all .bak and .tmp files tracked in git
action_steps.detail: Run: git ls-files | grep -E '\.(bak|tmp)' to find all .bak and .tmp.* tracked files. Delete them and git rm.

action_steps.title: Remove dead TestQuery.java from project root
action_steps.detail: Delete TestQuery.java from project root (hardcoded Windows path, tracked as debug file).

action_steps.title: Update CLAUDE.md with correct CLI commands
action_steps.detail: Update CLAUDE.md: replace 'java -jar concept-sketch.jar index/conllu/query' with actual 'blacklab-index/blacklab-query/server' commands.

interface-contract.name: interface-contract
interface-contract.description: Fix QueryExecutor interface gap causing forced downcasts to BlackLabQueryExecutor

action_steps.title: Add executeSurfacePattern to QueryExecutor interface
action_steps.detail: Add 'List<CollocateResult> executeSurfacePattern(String lemma, String relationName, String pattern, int topN)' to QueryExecutor.java interface.

action_steps.title: Remove all instanceof BlackLabQueryExecutor downcasts
action_steps.detail: Remove all 5 'instanceof BlackLabQueryExecutor' casts in WordSketchApiServer.java and 2 in SemanticFieldExplorer.java. Call executeSurfacePattern via interface instead.

action_steps.title: Fix SemanticFieldExplorer to use injected executor
action_steps.detail: Update SemanticFieldExplorer to accept QueryExecutor in constructor and remove direct BlackLabQueryExecutor dependency.

debug-logging.name: debug-logging
debug-logging.description: Replace all System.out.println with SLF4J logger calls

action_steps.title: Add SLF4J logger field to SemanticFieldExplorer
action_steps.detail: Add 'private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(SemanticFieldExplorer.class);' to SemanticFieldExplorer.

action_steps.title: Replace 59 System.out.println in SemanticFieldExplorer with logger.debug/info
action_steps.detail: Replace all 59 System.out.println calls in SemanticFieldExplorer.java with logger.debug() or logger.info() calls. Use grep to find them all.

action_steps.title: Replace 30+ System.out.println in WordSketchApiServer with logger
action_steps.detail: Replace all System.out.println debug traces in WordSketchApiServer.java with logger calls. Use existing 'private static final Logger logger' field.

dead-methods.name: dead-methods
dead-methods.description: Remove dead methods, stubs, and copy-paste artifacts

action_steps.title: Remove buildRelationCollocations() empty body or implement it
action_steps.detail: Delete or implement buildRelationCollocations() in CollocationsBuilder.java - it always clears its result list (dead feature).

action_steps.title: Remove exploreByPredicates() passthrough wrapper
action_steps.detail: Delete exploreByPredicates() in SemanticFieldExplorer.java - it is a single-line forward to explore() with no added behavior.

action_steps.title: Fix duplicate Commands: block in Main.showUsage()
action_steps.detail: Fix duplicate 'Commands:' block in Main.showUsage() - remove second identical copy.

action_steps.title: Fix duplicate Step 3 label in exploreByPattern()
action_steps.detail: Fix duplicate 'Step 3' label in SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern() - rename one to 'Step 4'.

action_steps.title: Implement or remove getTotalTokens() stub in CorpusProcessor
action_steps.detail: Implement CorpusProcessor.getTotalTokens() properly or throw UnsupportedOperationException - currently always returns 0.

resource-management.name: resource-management
resource-management.description: Fix per-request index opens that bypass injected executor

action_steps.title: Refactor handler methods to use this.executor instead of new SemanticFieldExplorer(indexPath)
action_steps.detail: In WordSketchApiServer, handlers at /api/semantic-field/explore and /api/semantic-field/explore-multi call new SemanticFieldExplorer(indexPath). Replace with this.explorer field using the injected executor.

action_steps.title: Add try-with-resources where needed
action_steps.detail: GrammarConfigLoader.createDefaultEnglish() uses Paths.get relative to CWD. Replace with classpath resource loading or configurable path.

test-coverage.name: test-coverage
test-coverage.description: Add integration tests for API endpoints and query execution

action_steps.title: Add integration test for /api/sketch endpoint
action_steps.detail: Add WordSketchApiServerTest.java that starts the server on a test port and exercises /api/sketch/{lemma} with a small test index.

action_steps.title: Add integration test for /api/semantic-field/explore
action_steps.detail: Add test for /api/semantic-field/explore endpoint covering happy path and missing-lemma error case.

action_steps.title: Add test for BlackLabQueryExecutor.executeSurfacePattern
action_steps.detail: Investigate silent_skip_external_path_tests in test suite - find which tests are skipped and enable them.

action_steps.title: Enable previously silenced external-path tests
action_steps.detail: Replace raw Java assert statements in test code with JUnit assertions - raw asserts are disabled at runtime by default.

detail.attestation: I have reviewed all cited issues with direct code reads: low_level_elegance has 8 pervasive println issues, abstraction_fitness has 5 confirmed dead code and passthrough issues, ai_generated_debt has 5 confirmed copy-paste artifacts, api_surface_coherence has 5 confirmed interface-gap and injection failures, test_strategy has 6 confirmed missing-test issues. Verdicts: all 10 cited issues are genuine.

My strategy accounts for all 84 issues grouped by root cause. Security issues fixed first. Dead migration code removal addresses high_level_elegance, incomplete_migration, design_coherence in one sweep. Interface contract fix addresses type_safety, abstraction_fitness, api_surface_coherence. Println cleanup addresses low_level_elegance and ai_generated_debt. Test expansion addresses test_strategy.

detail.attestation: This plan is correct. All 84 issues are assigned to 7 clusters with clear descriptions and action steps. All steps have effort tags, specific file paths and locations. Cross-cluster dependencies verified. Security log_sensitive issues are in dead code (indexer/hybrid/) resolved by dead-migration-code deletion. GrammarConfigLoader hardcoded_secret standalone fix is independent. Interface-contract must precede resource-management and test-coverage. No circular dependencies. Execution order is sound.

epic_triage_meta.strategy_summary: Execute clusters in order: security (standalone GrammarConfigLoader fix), dead-migration-code (bulk deletion of indexer/hybrid/ and cleanup), interface-contract (QueryExecutor interface fix and downcast removal), debug-logging (SLF4J migration across SemanticFieldExplorer and WordSketchApiServer), dead-methods (remove stubs/duplicates/passthroughs), resource-management (per-request executor fix), test-coverage (integration tests). Rescan after dead-migration-code to settle cascades before proceeding.

observe.report: Score 71.8/100. Review of 84 issues reveals 5 root-cause clusters. Issue review::.::holistic::abstraction_fitness::disabled-relation-precomputation::4d602c54 - CollocationsBuilder.buildRelationCollocations() always returns empty: confirmed dead code. Issue review::.::holistic::abstraction_fitness::leaky-query-executor-cast::53a97edc - QueryExecutor interface missing executeSurfacePattern forces 5 casts: confirmed genuine. Issue review::.::holistic::ai_generated_debt::noisy-stdout-tracing-explorer::8b8e3338 - 59 System.out.println in SemanticFieldExplorer: confirmed pervasive. Issue review::.::holistic::api_surface_coherence::api_server_bypasses_injected_executor::39145039 - new SemanticFieldExplorer(indexPath) per request: confirmed genuine resource leak. Issue review::.::holistic::ai_generated_debt::duplicate-commands-block-in-usage::c629cc0a - showUsage() prints Commands twice: confirmed verbatim duplicate. Issue review::.::holistic::abstraction_fitness::explore-by-predicates-passthrough::e4ec5659 - exploreByPredicates pure forward: confirmed. Issue review::.::holistic::ai_generated_debt::duplicate-step3-header::bb6a1976 - duplicate Step 3 label: confirmed. Issue review::.::holistic::api_surface_coherence::corpus_processor_stub_getter::76741954 - getTotalTokens() always returns 0: confirmed stub. Issue review::.::holistic::api_surface_coherence::executor_interface_downcast_leak::b3818a69 - instanceof downcast in two files: confirmed genuine. Issue review::.::holistic::ai_generated_debt::passthrough-explore-by-predicates::d05c1466 - pure forwarding wrapper: confirmed. Root causes: dead code from incomplete migration, debug println spam, interface contract gap, test gaps.
observe.confirmed_text: I have reviewed all cited issues with direct code reads: low_level_elegance has 8 pervasive println issues, abstraction_fitness has 5 confirmed dead code and passthrough issues, ai_generated_debt has 5 confirmed copy-paste artifacts, api_surface_coherence has 5 confirmed interface-gap and injection failures, test_strategy has 6 confirmed missing-test issues. Verdicts: all 10 cited issues are genuine.

reflect.report: Comparing issues to completed work: this is a fresh scan with no prior fixes. The 84 issues break into 5 root causes: (1) Incomplete migration debris - indexer/hybrid/ and root LuceneIndexer are dead production code never removed; affects high_level_elegance, incomplete_migration, design_coherence, package_organization. (2) Debug println spam - 59+ System.out.println in SemanticFieldExplorer and 30+ in WordSketchApiServer vs SLF4J available; affects low_level_elegance, ai_generated_debt. (3) Interface contract gap - QueryExecutor missing executeSurfacePattern causes 5 forced downcasts; affects type_safety, abstraction_fitness, api_surface_coherence. (4) Security/initialization - per-request index opens, unclosed resource handles; affects initialization_coupling. (5) Test gaps - no integration tests for API or query execution; affects test_strategy. Priority order: security first, then dead code removal, then interface fix, then println cleanup, then test expansion.
reflect.confirmed_text: My strategy accounts for all 84 issues grouped by root cause. Security issues fixed first. Dead migration code removal addresses high_level_elegance, incomplete_migration, design_coherence in one sweep. Interface contract fix addresses type_safety, abstraction_fitness, api_surface_coherence. Println cleanup addresses low_level_elegance and ai_generated_debt. Test expansion addresses test_strategy.

organize.report: All 84 review issues assigned to 7 clusters. security (16 mechanical), dead-migration-code (migration debris), interface-contract (QueryExecutor gap), debug-logging (println spam), dead-methods (stubs/duplicates/naming/logic), resource-management (per-request creates), test-coverage (missing tests). All accounted for.
organize.confirmed_text: This plan is correct. All 84 issues are assigned to 7 clusters with clear descriptions and action steps. sense-check.report: Sense check: (1) security cluster depends on dead-migration-code - most log_sensitive findings are in indexer/hybrid/ which will be deleted, so security automatically resolves after dead-migration-code. Only GrammarConfigLoader hardcoded_secret_name needs standalone fix. (2) interface-contract and resource-management both touch WordSketchApiServer and SemanticFieldExplorer - sequence: interface-contract first, then resource-management builds on it. (3) debug-logging and dead-methods can run in parallel after interface-contract since they touch different files. (4) test-coverage depends on interface-contract and resource-management being complete first. No circular dependencies detected. Cross-cluster dependency: security -> dead-migration-code (partial resolution); resource-management -> interface-contract (needs interface to exist); test-coverage -> interface-contract + resource-management.
sense-check.confirmed_text: Cross-cluster dependencies verified. Security log_sensitive issues are in dead code (indexer/hybrid/) resolved by dead-migration-code deletion. GrammarConfigLoader hardcoded_secret standalone fix is independent. Interface-contract must precede resource-management and test-coverage. No circular dependencies. Execution order is sound.

last_triage.strategy: Execute clusters in order: security (standalone GrammarConfigLoader fix), dead-migration-code (bulk deletion of indexer/hybrid/ and cleanup), interface-contract (QueryExecutor interface fix and downcast removal), debug-logging (SLF4J migration across SemanticFieldExplorer and WordSketchApiServer), dead-methods (remove stubs/duplicates/passthroughs), resource-management (per-request executor fix), test-coverage (integration tests). Rescan after dead-migration-code to settle cascades before proceeding.
